response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The lyrics are matched to Kanata's performance medley, with manual transcription used to verify precise phonetic phrasing and song structure. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized song titles and translated lyrics based on the context of each distinct stage performance. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are highly synchronized to the rapid shifts in tempo and vocals between each of the 7 songs. On-screen visual title cards for each song were integrated where appropriate.

subtitles.original: はにかむだけじゃつまんない
subtitles.english: Just being shy is boring,

subtitles.original: でしょ？
subtitles.english: right?

subtitles.original: あなたに捧げるわ
subtitles.english: I will dedicate to you

subtitles.original: 私の愛を遺す全て
subtitles.english: all of my love, everything I have to give.

subtitles.original: この手は私を守るただためあったのね
subtitles.english: These hands existed just to protect myself, didn't they?

subtitles.original: いつでも君と暮らすどんなさようならも希望を
subtitles.english: Always living with you, finding hope in any farewell.

subtitles.original: ラストはうんと飾らなきゃ
subtitles.english: I have to dress up the end as much as possible.

subtitles.original: 錆びと痛いだっけ
subtitles.english: Rust and pain, was it?

subtitles.original: チョイと少しだけ
subtitles.english: Just a tiny bit...

subtitles.original: DA・LI・LA 頭もキレイ
subtitles.english: DA・LI・LA, even my head is clean.

subtitles.original: [十万億土]
subtitles.english: [Song: Juumanyokudo]

subtitles.original: 最上 意地を抜け出し野原みんな暴れ
subtitles.english: Exiting our pride at the highest level, running wild in the fields,

subtitles.original: 重ねドレス 畳む鉄砲
subtitles.english: layering dresses, folding up guns.

subtitles.original: 天の采は投げられたのでしょう
subtitles.english: The die must have been cast from heaven.

subtitles.original: 最期 最期までお友達
subtitles.english: Friends until the very, very end.

subtitles.original: 呼び起こす覚悟に こちらへおいでよ
subtitles.english: To the resolve we awaken, come over here.

subtitles.original: 鏡を覗き込むは誰
subtitles.english: Who is that peering into the mirror?

subtitles.original: 恐れず僕と歌おう
subtitles.english: Sing with me without fear.

subtitles.original: パッパッパッパッパッパッパッパ保存
subtitles.english: Pa-pa-pa-pa-pa-pa-pa-pa

subtitles.original: 巡り巡るよ現に 覚悟を召そう
subtitles.english: Spinning round and round in reality, let's summon our resolve.

subtitles.original: そろそろ終わりにしないか
subtitles.english: Isn't it about time to bring this to an end?

subtitles.original: 今ならば美しいほら...
subtitles.english: Look, it would be beautiful if it were now.

subtitles.original: あー
subtitles.english: Ah...

subtitles.original: 君は今更戻れない
subtitles.english: You cannot turn back anymore.

subtitles.original: あー
subtitles.english: Ah...

subtitles.original: [別世界]
subtitles.english: [Song: Another World]

subtitles.original: 愛してくれ 僕のことも
subtitles.english: Love me, too,

subtitles.original: どうか邪魔はしないでから
subtitles.english: please do not get in my way.

subtitles.original: 遠い遠い別世界まで
subtitles.english: All the way to a far, far off, other world.

subtitles.original: それ触れ得ない
subtitles.english: It remains untouchable.

subtitles.original: パパ ママ 幕が上がる
subtitles.english: Papa, Mama, the curtain rises.

subtitles.original: ただまた会いたくて あなたにこの拍手を
subtitles.english: Just wanting to meet again, I give this applause to you.

subtitles.original: [Knock it out!]
subtitles.english: [Song: Knock it out!]

subtitles.original: 無敵なアイ アイ アイ 会いたいな
subtitles.english: Invincible eye, eye, eye, I want to meet you.

subtitles.original: 着飾れ ほら ヒール 綺麗に フル装備
subtitles.english: Dress up, look, heels beautifully, fully equipped.

subtitles.original: 無い ない ない 意味ないな
subtitles.english: No, no, no, there's no meaning.

subtitles.original: 私の称賛 壊してクライド...
subtitles.english: My praise, break it and collide.

subtitles.original: [おらくる]
subtitles.english: [Song: Oracle]

subtitles.original: 安楽安楽妄想、ね、傷つけたりしないで
subtitles.english: Easy, easy delusion, hey, don't hurt me.

subtitles.original: こんなバグだらけの世界になっちゃって ごめんね保存
subtitles.english: I'm sorry this world ended up so full of bugs.

subtitles.original: 大丈夫、安全圏にようこそ、曖昧な世界にこれ
subtitles.english: It's okay, welcome to the safe zone, to this ambiguous world.

subtitles.original: 見捨てないから ずっと今日も
subtitles.english: Because I won't abandon you, today or forever.

subtitles.original: 安楽安楽神様、敵なし法になれ
subtitles.english: Easy, easy God, become an unrivaled law.

subtitles.original: 固定的な点になるまで 愛してあげるね
subtitles.english: I'll love you until we become a fixed point.

subtitles.original: どん底で見届けて、ボロボロに恋焦がして
subtitles.english: Watch over me from the rock bottom, yearning in tatters,

subtitles.original: 忘れちゃうくらい、笑っちゃうくらい、ちゃんとアイ・アイ・アイ・ラブ・ユー
subtitles.english: enough to forget, enough to laugh, I really love love love, I love you!

subtitles.original: [Last-resort]
subtitles.english: [Song: Last-resort]

subtitles.original: まずは息を殺せ 音は立てるなよ 奴らに気付かれる前に
subtitles.english: First, hold your breath and don't make a sound, before they notice you.

subtitles.original: 次、爪を研ぎ澄ませ その時を待て 全ては一瞬のために
subtitles.english: Next, sharpen your claws and wait for the moment, all for one instant.

subtitles.original: そして覚悟しろ 最後の時は おののくような自分に
subtitles.english: And prepare yourself, when the final moment comes, for your trembling self.

subtitles.original: 世界を変える奇跡は今
subtitles.english: The miracle that will change the world is now!

subtitles.original: カリスマの前に アイドルの凶器
subtitles.english: Before charisma, the idol's weapon.

subtitles.original: 全部ぶち抜いてよ ラスト・リゾート
subtitles.english: Shoot through everything, Last-resort!

subtitles.original: トリックも最後さ 壊滅の世界で
subtitles.english: This is the final trick, in a ruined world.

subtitles.original: 死に物狂い 射し抜いて 信じきれないなら
subtitles.english: Pierce through desperately, if you can't believe it...

subtitles.original: 刹那
subtitles.english: An instant...

subtitles.original: 射ち抜け
subtitles.english: Shoot through.

subtitles.original: すべてを
subtitles.english: Everything.

subtitles.original: 壊して 一瞬に懸けて 放て ラスト・リゾート
subtitles.english: Break it! Stake it all on an instant and fire! Last-resort!

subtitles.original: 僕のすべてを込めて 放て ラスト・リゾート
subtitles.english: With all of myself, fire! Last-resort!

subtitles.original: あなたがくれた希望で
subtitles.english: With the hope you gave me,

subtitles.original: 約束の羽で今
subtitles.english: with the promised wings, now...

subtitles.original: 羽ばたくじゃあ ともにゆく
subtitles.english: I must spread my wings, we will go together!

subtitles.original: 誓いの先へ
subtitles.english: Beyond our vow.

subtitles.original: 壊れるまで 遠く遠く
subtitles.english: Until we break, far, far away,

subtitles.original: 今の僕は片翼でいい
subtitles.english: for now, a single wing is enough for me.

subtitles.original: 飛べるよ 信じて
subtitles.english: I can fly, believe in me.

subtitles.original: 飛べるよ その先へ
subtitles.english: I can fly, beyond that point.

subtitles.original: 飛べるよ
subtitles.english: I can fly!
